name: forge_doctrine_for
description: List the AVP-Doctrine rules applicable to a specific path in the workspace. Derives context tokens from the path components (crate name + directory + leaf filename) and matches them against each rule's applies_to entries. Use this before editing code to know which rules govern the change — these rule ids should be cited in any Findings the new code emits (via Finding.citing). Output is sorted by rule id for deterministic comparison across runs.

path.description: Filesystem path within the workspace. Examples: 'crates/forge-phases', 'crates/loom-cms-render/src/lib.rs', 'cms/index.json'.

terse.description: One-line-per-rule output (id + name only). Useful for citation lookup.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
